app_scope_note: Custom metric operations are available in PAPM desktop app only; not Power Fx.

forbidden_operators.note: Word-based logical operators are not supported in PAPM formula syntax

forbid_brackets_for_simple_names.description: Brackets around attribute names are not valid syntax. Simple identifiers should be used directly.
forbid_brackets_for_simple_names.validation: Reject any formula containing [identifier] where identifier contains no spaces

require_getvalue_for_spaces.description: Attribute names containing spaces must use the GETVALUE function.
require_getvalue_for_spaces.validation: Ensure attributes with spaces are accessed via GETVALUE() function only
